items.name: Ancient Bow 2h
items.description: Is it ancient, or is it Ancient?
items.attacks: Ancient bow two hand pierce (35-38 Dmg, Rng 96, Blunt, range)

items.name: Ancient Helmet
items.description: Is it ancient, or is it Ancient? A sturdy helmet with two Vytrax horns potruding from its front.

items.name: Apple Cider
items.description: This golden Apple Cider offers warmth and vigor with every sip.

items.name: Astralite
items.description: The remarkable durability of Astralite makes it essential for the creation of various high-quality Ardyn items.

items.name: Astrasome
items.description: A pod-like organism that can be used to create <sprite=1204> Chronoblasts which grow into adult Ardyn.

items.name: Axeward 2h
items.description: It's an axe that digs well. I don't know what else to tell ya. On the handle, the name Dustin Pundt has been engraved. It's a huge engraving. Takes up most of it. Just, wow.
items.attacks: Axeward two hand strike (55-65 Dmg, Rng 14, Blunt, melee)

items.name: Blacklotus Greatcap Tree Seed
items.description: Used to grow the Blacklotus Greatcap.

items.name: Blade of Brian
items.discoveryHint: It's said that Brian was a scholar king. But I haven't found any evidence to support the claim.
items.attacks: Blade of brian cut (56-66 Dmg, Rng 14, Slash, melee), Blade of brian pierce (57-65 Dmg, Rng 14, Blunt, melee)

items.name: Blood Crown Spore
items.description: Used to grow Blood Crown mushrooms.

items.name: Bone Boots
items.description: Huh. They actually look pretty good.

items.name: Bone Breastplate
items.description: Whoever made this was totally chill.

items.name: Bronze Bow 2h
items.attacks: Bronze bow two hand pierce (13-15 Dmg, Rng 96, Blunt, range)

items.name: Bronze Cap Spore

items.name: Caelum Oscula Tree Seed
items.description: Used to grow Caelum Oscula Trees.

items.name: Chella
items.description: Chella roughly translates to "soft cake" and is a Tomek food staple. It is mostly comprised of stone and copper.

items.name: Chicken And Waffles
items.description: You've heard of chicken and pancakes? Well, be prepared to experience a delicacy manifested from the very heavens.

items.name: Clay Tablet I
items.description: A rectangular, flat tablet that has various markings on the front.

items.name: Coal
items.description: A fuel source useful to many production jobs.

items.name: Darby's Pointy Stick 1h
items.attacks: Darbys pointy stick pierce (63-65 Dmg, Rng 14, Blunt, melee)

items.name: Deen's Lucky Fishing Pole 2h
items.discoveryHint: What can I tell you about Deen? He''s an infamous outlaw that wanders the land with his sidekick, Chicken Greg. Whereabouts: Unknown.
items.attacks: Deens fishing pole two hand strike (25-32 Dmg, Rng 14, Blunt, melee)

items.name: Desert Shimmer
items.description: It's unclear if the previous owner was a god, or if the crown makes you one...
items.discoveryHint: Some say it’s a crown. Others, a mere headpiece. Desert caravans whisper that its bearer becomes all-powerful.

items.name: Dirt Clod
items.description: A pile of soil that can be used to make dirt blocks.

items.name: Elderberry
items.description: Thought to be named after the Elders whose ruins often depicted themselves eating the fruit.

items.name: Forest Emerald
items.description: The center shines with a light which resembles leaves backlit by a midsummer sun.

items.name: Happy Cat's Kris 1h
items.attacks: Happy cats kris one hand cut (50-60 Dmg, Rng 14, Slash, melee), Happy cats kris one hand pierce (52-58 Dmg, Rng 14, Blunt, melee)

items.name: Health Potion
items.description: Mends flesh and bone but leaves the soul to ache alone.

items.name: Ice Root
items.description: Surprisingly, this delicious root vegetable has warming properties.

items.name: Bottled Ink
items.description: Used to create books, tomes, journals, and other written works.

items.name: Sogweed Bulb Of Ink
items.description: Used to create books, tomes, journals, and other written works.

items.description: Used to create books, tomes, journals, and other written works.

items.attacks: Iron tongs one hand strike (7-8 Dmg, Rng 14, Blunt, melee)

items.name: Koosh Kasheen's Magic Fishing Pole 2h
items.discoveryHint: Ah, Koosh Kasheen... A god? An immortal? A trickster? Tomek merchants often speak of this strange being appearing near underground lakes fishing with a magical rod that can catch anything. Then again, Tomek are known for telling questionable stories...
items.attacks: Koosh kasheens fishing pole two hand strike (54-64 Dmg, Rng 14, Blunt, melee)

items.name: Kotha Scale
items.description: A fish scale, big as a man's fist, bright as gold, and strong as iron.
items.discoveryHint: The Kotha? Just a myth. Drunken sailors see sunlight on the water and call it a sea monster.

items.name: Kotha Scale Leggings
items.description: My dad used to wear pants like these in the 480's.

items.name: Lady Harp Flour
items.description: A sweet fragrance eminates from the flour. It evokes memories of summer on a distant island. These are not your memories but somehow they feel like yours.

items.name: Lfeth's Chain Whip 2h
items.description: Fabled weapon carried by the Ancient warrior, Lfeth.
items.discoveryHint: Stories of this warrior have been shared around countless campfires. I’ve documented hundreds of legends, and this one appears time and time again over thousands of years.
items.attacks: Lfeths chain whip cut (55-60 Dmg, Rng 14, Slash, melee)

items.name: Light Leather Boots
items.description: Ever been kicked in the face by a pair of leather boots?\nSir, this is a Chi Chi's...

items.name: Light Leather Hat
items.description: It's a fashion statement, that's for sure.

items.name: Light Leather Pants
items.description: These are--without a doubt--the ugliest pants I've ever seen.

items.name: Light Leather Vest
items.description: You probably don't have the muscles to pull this look off...

items.name: Loth Loth's Crown
items.description: Smells awful. Looks like it's made up of rough metals.
items.discoveryHint: Loth Loth... Supposed Nequhtli King. Though, I doubt that rabble has a leader...

items.name: Loth Loth's Stick 1h
items.description: A common weapon amongst the Nequhtli, it's unclear why this stick is more special than the others...
items.discoveryHint: I’ve heard tales of a giant rat leading a horde in the darkest pits of Odd, wielding nothing but a pointed stick.
items.attacks: Loth loths stick strike (48-50 Dmg, Rng 14, Blunt, melee)

items.name: Macuahuitl 1h
items.attacks: Macuahuitl one hand cut (18-22 Dmg, Rng 14, Slash, melee), Macuahuitl one hand pierce (19-21 Dmg, Rng 14, Blunt, melee)

items.name: Mala Skola
items.description: Mala Skola roughly translates to "hardy soup". It is mostly comprised of dirt and iron.

items.name: Minami's Squeakenbabs
items.description: Minami, while stranded on an island, had only one companion. Until they didn't.

items.name: Mushroom Wine
items.description: By god, they did it. They really did it.

items.name: Omelette
items.description: Named after, Ome Lette, the chef brilliant enough to take a stick and absolutely wreck some eggs.

items.name: Paper
items.description: Used to create books, tomes, journals, and other written works.

items.name: Plant Fiber
items.description: Leftover plant matter useful for crafting and construction.

items.name: Ren
items.description: An enchanted, indestructible coin that reads, 'Shin-Ghirinan,' and has the portrait of a regal humanoid. It is the dominant form of currency in Odd.

items.name: Rope Buckler 1h
items.attacks: Rope buckler one hand slam (2-4 Dmg, Rng 14, Pierce, melee)

items.name: Rose Crown
items.description: The Gwdir Queen, the Gwnvayth, wears the Rose Crown. Without it, she will die.

items.name: Setha's Orb 1h
items.description: Said to be created from pure spite, this item has the power to unleash a powerful blast.
items.discoveryHint: A legendary item carried by Setha, god of fury. Some say she slumbers deep beneath the earth, waiting to exact her revenge.
items.attacks: Sethas orb single energy (64-70 Dmg, Rng 64, Physical, magic)

items.name: Setha's Scythe 2h
items.description: A terrifying weapon once wielded by a fierce god.

items.name: Skyberry
items.description: First discovered by Pheather. It is said they turned it into a mighty potion that made them the greatest warrior in the land.

items.name: Skyberry Wine
items.description: Prepare to meet god. This drink is potent.

items.name: Sleipnir Special
items.description: I'm surprised there aren't any bugs in this recipe.

items.name: Slipway Disc
items.description: A stone disc that takes the bearer instantly to where they want to go.

items.name: Tallow
items.description: A hardy plant that can be made into teas and hay.

items.name: Teiloc
items.description: Made from Lady Harp Flour, this sweet, nourishing pastry is surprisingly resilient to decay.

items.name: Thresk 1h
items.description: A rune-etched hand tool that channels ancient earth magic to hasten plant growth and restore withered roots.
items.attacks: Thresk one hand strike (3-6 Dmg, Rng 14, Blunt, melee)

items.name: Tin Ore
items.description: Used with copper ore to make bronze ingot.

items.name: Toasted Xan
items.description: Jam, bread, and--what's this? Gently browned over a flame?

items.name: Tomek Fries
items.description: The way the Tomek like them: lots of salt.

items.name: Tome of Industry
items.description: A detailed account of craftsmanship, engineering, and the rise of industry, exploring tools, techniques, and mechanical innovations.

items.name: Trailmix
items.description: A collection of nuts and seeds.

items.name: Merescis
items.description: A vibrant fruit that grows on T'Thdir trees. Its flavor is a mix of strawberry and banana.

items.name: Vanguard 1h
items.attacks: Vanguard one hand slam (12-14 Dmg, Rng 14, Pierce, melee)

items.name: Void Crystal
items.description: A mysterious relic of the past. Power emanates from it.

items.name: Void Shard
items.description: Fragment piece of a void crystal.

items.name: Bucket of Water
items.description: A wooden bucket full of fresh water.

items.name: Sogweed Bulb Of Water
items.description: A bulb from the Sogweed plant that has been filled with water.

items.name: Weathered Scroll I
items.description: A heavily aged piece of scrollwork with four lines of text written on its front.

items.name: Wir
items.description: Wir is a fine crystal that is created by applying intense pressure to T'Thdir Seeds. It has many benefits; namely, the ability to coerce Nelescuro into various forms.

items.attacks: Wood sling two hand strike (5-9 Dmg, Rng 96, Blunt, range)

items.name: Wood Spear 2h
items.attacks: Wood spear two hand throw pierce (8-10 Dmg, Rng 64, Blunt, range), Wood spear two hand pierce (5-7 Dmg, Rng 14, Blunt, melee)

items.name: Wood Spoon 1h
items.attacks: Wood spoon one hand strike (1-2 Dmg, Rng 14, Blunt, melee)

items.name: Wood Tongs 1h
items.description: Wood tongs? Really? You do know where tongs are used, right?
items.attacks: Wood tongs one hand strike (2-4 Dmg, Rng 14, Blunt, melee)

items.name: Wood War Hammer 2h
items.attacks: Wood war hammer two hand strike (15-20 Dmg, Rng 14, Pierce, melee)

items.name: Xanatos 2h
items.attacks: Xanatos two hand cut (129-137 Dmg, Rng 14, Slash, melee)

items.name: Youth Potion
items.description: You'll look younger but you'll never feel it.

blocks.name: Bedrock
blocks.description: Indestructible. What sorcery created such strong rock?

blocks.name: Blood Sand
blocks.description: It is said Blood Sand was created when a god was killed by a long forgotten hero.

blocks.name: Bone
blocks.description: The creature that produced this must have been huge.

blocks.name: Bronze Ornate
blocks.description: Various designs and patterns depicting stories from legend can be seen on the wall. Is that a man and a chicken?

blocks.name: Clay Brick
blocks.description: Simple. Dependable. Who doesn't like a good clay brick wall?

blocks.name: Dirt
blocks.description: Dirt provides fertile soil for growing crops.

blocks.name: Ember Rock
blocks.description: Some think Ember Rock didn't exist before the Fracture. There are no records of it, but, then again, there aren't many records from before this time.

blocks.name: Fire
blocks.description: Careful, hot!

blocks.name: Ice
blocks.description: Covering much of the poles of Odd, ice walls can be used for reliable shelter.

blocks.name: Ornate Iron
blocks.description: Carved into its surface one can see many flora and fauna. Is that a cat and chicken?

blocks.name: Kalite
blocks.description: One of the most common forms of stone on Odd, this rock has been used for many a castle. Silv the builder was known for their beautiful stonework often using Kalite as a resource.

blocks.name: Kwlix
blocks.description: Gwdir homes often use Kwlix as their walls. Surprisingly, they''re quite cozy.

blocks.name: Empty
blocks.description: No props or blocks fill this space.

blocks.name: Sand
blocks.description: It's coarse and rough and irritating and it gets everywhere!

blocks.name: Stone Ornate
blocks.description: Engravings depict awesome images upon its surface.

blocks.name: Astracube
blocks.description: Where is all this stuff going?

blocks.name: Bee Hive
blocks.description: Bees use hives to store honey and reproduce.

blocks.name: Bronze Door
blocks.description: A strong door made of mostly bronze ingot.

blocks.name: Bronze Stairs
blocks.description: Stairs are faster than ladders, but they block pathing upwards from below.

blocks.name: Clay Pot
blocks.description: Go on. Smash it. You know you want to.

blocks.name: Fiber Mat
blocks.description: Improves sleep?

blocks.name: Immolation Rostrum
blocks.description: With the powers of time weaving, this device allows Ardyn Technochrons to manipulate matter.

blocks.name: Iron Stairs
blocks.description: Stairs are faster than ladders, but they block pathing upwards from below.

blocks.name: Nascien
blocks.description: A container cultivated from Nelescuro grass, renowned for its exceptional ability to preserve perishables.

blocks.name: Nyctium Stairs
blocks.description: Stairs are faster than ladders, but they block pathing upwards from below.

blocks.name: Ohmnix
blocks.description: A vine-like object grown in Nelescuro grass, with strong, dexterous limbs used to create Wir and other items.

blocks.name: Rope Basket
blocks.description: A simple rope basket, hand-woven, durable, and perfect for everyday use.

blocks.name: Rutile Stairs
blocks.description: Stairs are faster than ladders, but they block pathing upwards from below.

blocks.name: Sable Stairs
blocks.description: Stairs are faster than ladders, but they block pathing upwards from below.

blocks.name: Steel Stairs
blocks.description: Stairs are faster than ladders, but they block pathing upwards from below.

blocks.name: Stone Barrel
blocks.description: Makes things taste awful but you'll get your minerals!

blocks.name: Stone Bed
blocks.description: Improves sleep if you like 'em firm.

blocks.name: Stone Bin
blocks.description: Excellent for holding resources.

blocks.name: Stone Boulder
blocks.description: Placed here by inexorable forces percieved only by time stretched over milennia.

blocks.name: Stone Chest
blocks.description: A sturdy container for protecting valuables.

blocks.name: Stone Crate
blocks.description: My god, this thing is heavy!

blocks.name: Stone Fence
blocks.description: Useful for containing animals.

blocks.name: Stone Chair
blocks.description: Mmm, cozy!

blocks.name: Stone Stairs
blocks.description: Stairs are faster than ladders, but they block pathing upwards from below.

blocks.name: Stone Stool
blocks.description: This is livin'!

blocks.name: Stone Trap-Door
blocks.description: Drops entities into open block below.

blocks.name: Stone Well
blocks.description: Wells fill with water over time, and containers can then be filled there.

blocks.name: Void Cell
blocks.description: A void crystal that has been fixed in place. These are used as power sources for other magical props.

blocks.name: Void Crystal Node
blocks.description: As you draw near, your very being hums with the pulse of the universe.

blocks.name: Void Gate
blocks.description: Used to summon creatures from the void. Needs an adjacent void cell to function.

blocks.name: Wood Barrel
blocks.description: Perfect for any liquids.

blocks.name: Wood Bed
blocks.description: Improves sleep.

blocks.name: Wood Bin
blocks.description: Excellent for holding resources.

blocks.name: Wood Chest
blocks.description: Impenetrable.

blocks.name: Wood Crate
blocks.description: Ideal for holding most things.

blocks.name: Wood Fence
blocks.description: Useful for containing animals.

blocks.name: Large Wood Cage
blocks.description: Used to capture large sized animals. Use the "Capture Caged Entity" job on the cage when an animal is captured.

blocks.name: Medium Wood Cage
blocks.description: Used to capture medium sized animals. Use the "Capture Caged Entity" job on the cage when an animal is captured.

blocks.name: Wood Roost
blocks.description: Where birds can lay eggs.

blocks.name: Wood Chair
blocks.description: Pair this up with a stool and you are thriving.

blocks.name: Small Wood Cage
blocks.description: Used to capture small sized animals. Use the "Capture Caged Entity" job on the cage when an animal is captured.

blocks.name: Wood Stairs
blocks.description: Stairs are faster than ladders, but they block pathing upwards from below.

blocks.name: Wood Stool
blocks.description: Your feet won't even know what to do with this thing.

blocks.name: Wood Training Dummy
blocks.description: You won't look cool using it, but you might just learn something. Like how to beat a foe that stands perfectly still.

blocks.name: Wood Trap-Door
blocks.description: Drops entities into open block below.

blocks.name: Wood Trunk
blocks.description: This once mighty tree, now broken, slumbers in the earth where it was sprung.

blocks.name: Wood Well
blocks.description: Wells fill with water over time, and containers can then be filled there.

races.name: Ancient
races.description: The Ancients used the Void to achieve immortality while sacrificing their living forms. Although extremely powerful, their inability to procreate has resulted in their numbers dwindling over the last 500 years.
perks: Attuned To The Void: All ancients start with higher ranks in void-based skills
Air Of Superiority: Having no lungs, Ancients are unaffected by environments without oxygen

races.name: Ardyn
races.description: The Ardyn are a feared and mistrusted race. Their rapid aging combined with the inherent ability to siphon the life-force from other entities has produced a culture intent on the dominance and subjugation of others. Their profound understanding of void magic and the construction of beautiful works of art is often overshadowed by their brutal nature.
perks: Retroanimate: An inherent ability to steal the life force from other living creatures to keep from aging
Unending Fast: Ardyn do not need to eat food or drink beverages
Passing Time: Time affects the Ardyn at a faster rate than normal creatures
Time Weave: The ability to build and grow objects by manipulating time.

races.name: Cave Mip
races.description: Caves mips are found deep underground. They are a friendly creature that are often domesticated by the Tomek people.

races.name: Chicken
races.description: An ancient and proud race.

races.name: Chirpen
races.description: Do not look in the eyes.

races.name: Cow
races.description: Cows produce milk and are some of Odd's kindest beings.

races.name: Exonaut
races.description: Not much is known about them other than that they are beings from far, far away. Beyond even the void. And they are old. And powerful...

races.name: Faceless
races.description: The faceless are a mythical creature that are said to take on the shape of others.

races.name: Gharox
races.description: A gentle, furry beast often used for tasks that require a pack animal. Some cultures keep them as guards, valuing their fierce protection of the young.

races.name: Gully
races.description: A loud creature with the intelligence of a stale piece of bread.

races.name: Gwdir
races.description: Having a symbiotic relationship with the mighty T'Thdir tree, the Gwdir thrive effortlessly in the forests. They harness their expert farming skills to cultivate objects in harmony with the wilds.
perks: One With Nature: Start with an increased farming skill.

races.name: Human
races.description: Living in small communities since the Fracture, Humans have only recently started to re-form their once great kingdoms. Experts at settling in any environment and having exceptional diplomatic skills, the Human race has excelled in the age of settlement.
perks: Resourceful: Humans start with higher skills

races.name: Machix
races.description: A construct designed by the Ancients to build their cities.

races.name: Moss Kuplin
races.description: A quick, cheerful critter that takes pleasure in hauling.

races.name: Nequhtli
races.description: Despite their resemblance to rats, these subterranean creatures are unrelated. The Tomek consider the Nequhtli bitter enemies and wage an endless war against them in the depths of Odd.

races.name: Owl
races.description: A symbol of intelligence and wisdom among humans, often used in heraldry.

races.name: Pit Zargl
races.description: A slimy creature that devours its prey by encasing it within its body. Kill it before it duplicates!

races.name: Rat
races.description: Infamous thieves of seed stock.

races.name: Sheep
races.description: Excellent sources of wool and friendship.

races.name: Snoot
races.description: A surprisingly friendly beast. These serpent-like critters love warm weather, and will often curl up beside travelers for warmth. Unless provoked, they rarely attack.

races.name: Stradken
races.description: An insectoid race that favors diplomacy over conflict.

races.name: Tamtallen
races.description: A completely blind creature that is often found in the caves under the voidlands.

races.name: Tomek
races.description: Covered in stone scales, the Tomek possess incredible toughness and have few natural predators. Unless threatened, they will rarely venture outside their subterranean homes. To this day, the location of their capital city, Fengold Keep, is still unknown.
perks: Stone Skin: Tomek have a natural toughness of +5
Deep Rock Dwellers: Tomek are expert miners and get a 5 point bonus to mining

races.name: Traelik
races.description: Not the prettiest creature to grace our realm, but they are loyal and dependable.

races.name: Void Imp
races.description: Void Imps are a subterranean creature that can easily dig tunnels with the long claws on their hands. It is unclear how they got to the Void in the first place.

races.name: Void Woken
races.description: A quiet and mysterious race, often found aiding the Ancients. They return to the void when they grow tired of our realm.

races.name: Vytrax
races.description: Two bull-like horns protrude from the canine forehead. These creatures are extremely territorial.

statuses.name: Adult
statuses.description: Can have a profession.

statuses.name: Adult Tomek
statuses.description: Can have a profession.

statuses.name: Aeternal
statuses.description: Long ago, the Ancients harnessed their knowledge and ingenuity to extend their lifespans, but this came at a steep price: they relinquished their physical forms, leaving behind nothing but their eternal skeletons.

statuses.name: Bee
statuses.description: Collects pollen from flowers.

statuses.name: Duplicate
statuses.description: Has a chance to spawn a duplicate of itself over time.

statuses.name: Primarch
statuses.description: A leader of an Ancient empire.

statuses.name: Ancient Wisdom
statuses.description: Ancient racial perk.

statuses.name: Archenthrall
statuses.description: In dire moments, some Ancients merge fully with the void, becoming mighty Archenthralls. They sacrifice much knowledge for immense power.

statuses.name: Relentless
statuses.description: Ardyn racial perk.

statuses.name: Blessing Of Koosh
statuses.description: Koosh Kasheen has blessed this entity for its peaceful nature.

statuses.name: Burning
statuses.description: Will receive damage while temperature above 99.

statuses.name: Calm
statuses.description: Is neither happy or sad.

statuses.name: Can Be Butchered
statuses.description: Can be butchered at an Animal Enclosure.

statuses.name: Can Graze
statuses.description: Can eat vegetation to regain hunger. Place in animal enclosure to limit grazing to there.

statuses.name: Can Relax With Drink
statuses.description: Can go to the Tavern to enjoy a drink.

statuses.name: Old Age
statuses.description: This entity has died from old age.

statuses.name: Lithification
statuses.description: Cave mips have the unique ability to eat normal foods and produce dirts, stones, and ores as a byproduct.

statuses.name: Lithification
statuses.description: Cave mips have the unique ability to eat normal foods and produce dirts, stones, and ores as a byproduct.

statuses.name: Learning New Profession
statuses.description: This entity recently switched professions and is learning their new trade.

statuses.name: Has Companion
statuses.description: Is partnered with another entity.

statuses.name: Control Group 10
statuses.description: Control Groups are used to organize entities into groups that can easily be selected

statuses.name: Control Group 1
statuses.description: Control Groups are used to organize entities into groups that can easily be selected

statuses.name: Control Group 2
statuses.description: Control Groups are used to organize entities into groups that can easily be selected

statuses.name: Control Group 3
statuses.description: Control Groups are used to organize entities into groups that can easily be selected

statuses.name: Control Group 4
statuses.description: Control Groups are used to organize entities into groups that can easily be selected

statuses.name: Control Group 5
statuses.description: Control Groups are used to organize entities into groups that can easily be selected

statuses.name: Control Group 6
statuses.description: Control Groups are used to organize entities into groups that can easily be selected

statuses.name: Control Group 7
statuses.description: Control Groups are used to organize entities into groups that can easily be selected

statuses.name: Control Group 8
statuses.description: Control Groups are used to organize entities into groups that can easily be selected

statuses.name: Control Group 9
statuses.description: Control Groups are used to organize entities into groups that can easily be selected

statuses.name: Cooling
statuses.description: Temperature is dropping.

statuses.name: Curse Of Koosh
statuses.description: Koosh Kasheen has cursed this entity for unprovoked violence.

statuses.name: In Danger
statuses.description: In danger.

statuses.name: Dead
statuses.description: Has died.

statuses.name: Dead (Burned)
statuses.description: Has died from burning.

statuses.name: Dead (Combat)
statuses.description: Has died from combat.

statuses.name: Dead (Disease)
statuses.description: Has died from disease.

statuses.name: Dead (Drowning)
statuses.description: Has died from drowning.

statuses.name: Dead (Frozen)
statuses.description: Has died from freezing.

statuses.name: Dead (Old Age)
statuses.description: Has died from old age.

statuses.name: Dead (Starvation)
statuses.description: Has died from starvation.

statuses.name: Dead (Thirst)
statuses.description: Has died from thirst.

statuses.name: Dead
statuses.description: Has died.

statuses.name: Deep Senectia
statuses.description: The late stages of time debt, which occurs when Ardyn go too long without siphoning life from other entities.

statuses.name: Dehydrated
statuses.description: Will lose health until Thirst has been restored by drinking.

statuses.name: Drowning
statuses.description: Is drowning.

statuses.name: Drunk
statuses.description: Drunk entities move faster, and regain energy over time, but have a lowered max health.

statuses.name: Egg Fertilized
statuses.description: Has mated and has a fertilized egg ready to lay.

statuses.name: Elder
statuses.description: They are susceptible to dying of old age and move a bit slower.

statuses.name: Elder Tomek
statuses.description: Can have a profession.

statuses.name: Embarrassed
statuses.description: Their confidence is shaken.

statuses.name: Extreme Old Age
statuses.description: This entity is so old its body has started to completely fall apart.

statuses.name: Captured
statuses.description: The player can control this entity but not re-assign professions

statuses.name: Hostile
statuses.description: Will attack on sight

statuses.name: Neutral
statuses.description: Neutral entities may attack if threatened or if they see prey

statuses.name: Citizen
statuses.description: The player can control this entity, unlock their research, and change their profession.

statuses.name: Freezing
statuses.description: Will receive damage while temperature below 0 and Cold Tolerance.

statuses.name: Naturalist
statuses.description: Gwdir racial perk.

statuses.name: Happy
statuses.description: Is very happy with the current state of things. Skill output increased.

statuses.name: Harmful Item Consumed
statuses.description: This entity has consumed an item that is considered harmful in their diet.

statuses.name: Has Milk
statuses.description: Milk can be extracted from this animal.

statuses.name: Hermit
statuses.description: Doing things yourself has honed your skills.

statuses.name: Superior Room Aura
statuses.description: Acquired by being in a superior room. Raises morale.

statuses.name: Holding Breath
statuses.description: Is holding breath.

statuses.name: Noble Strength
statuses.description: A kingly power emanates from this leader of humans.

statuses.name: Human Monarch
statuses.description: A leader of a human kingdom.

statuses.name: Noble Vitality
statuses.description: The queen of the humans carries a fortitude beyond any ordinary person.

statuses.name: Resourceful
statuses.description: Human racial perk.

statuses.name: Hungry
statuses.description: This entity is in the early stage of hunger and should eat food. Before long, they will become starved and start to lose health.

statuses.name: Hollowgut
statuses.description: Tomek get hollowgut when they haven't consumed enough stone and ore based foods. Before long, they will get crackbone fever.

statuses.name: Hydrated
statuses.description: Has recently rehydrated with a drink.

statuses.name: Ignorance Is Bliss
statuses.description: Non-sapient entities get a small bonus to happiness.

statuses.name: Low Intelligence
statuses.description: This entity has a low intelligence level.

statuses.name: High Intelligence
statuses.description: This entity has a high intelligence level.

statuses.name: Carrying Item
statuses.description: This entity is carrying at least one item.

statuses.name: Can Carry Items
statuses.description: This entity has additional room in their inventory to carry more items.

statuses.name: Lays Eggs
statuses.description: After mating, Female chickens can lay an egg in a Roost.

statuses.name: Lonely
statuses.description: Is looking for companion.

statuses.name: Loved Item Consumed
statuses.description: This entity has consumed an item that they love. Their happiness is increased.

statuses.name: Power Unit
statuses.description: Loses energy over time. Needs energy to function properly.

statuses.name: Power Unit Drained
statuses.description: Needs to be recharged.

statuses.name: Metabolism
statuses.description: Regulates hunger, thirst, and energy.

statuses.name: Metabolism
statuses.description: Regulates hunger, thirst, and energy.

statuses.name: Item Not Equipped
statuses.description: Does not have an item in their uniform equipped.

statuses.name: Morale
statuses.description: Morale controls an entity's spirit. Morale is affected by room quality, clothing, and diet.

statuses.name: Over Encumbered
statuses.description: This entity is carrying more items than their carry skill allows.

statuses.name: Passive Healing
statuses.description: Health regains over time.

statuses.name: Poisoned
statuses.description: Will receive damage until cured or wears off.

statuses.name: Is Pollinated
statuses.description: This entity has pollen on them.

statuses.name: Poor Diet
statuses.description: This entity has eaten something that doesn't agree with their diet.

statuses.name: Squalid Room Aura
statuses.description: Acquired by being in a squalid room. Lowers morale.

statuses.name: Pregnant (Human)
statuses.description: Spawns a child when the duration ends.

statuses.name: Pregnant (Cat)
statuses.description: Spawns a child when the duration ends.

statuses.name: Pregnant (Cow)
statuses.description: Spawns a child when the duration ends.

statuses.name: Pregnant (Deer)
statuses.description: Spawns a child when the duration ends.

statuses.name: Pregnant (Dog)
statuses.description: Spawns a child when the duration ends.

statuses.name: Pregnant (Gharox)
statuses.description: Spawns a child when the duration ends.

statuses.name: Pregnant (Lopen)
statuses.description: Spawns a child when the duration ends.

statuses.name: Pregnant (Mirmit)
statuses.description: Spawns a child when the duration ends.

statuses.name: Pregnant (Nequhtli)
statuses.description: Spawns a child when the duration ends.

statuses.name: Pregnant (Rabbit)
statuses.description: Spawns a child when the duration ends.

statuses.name: Pregnant (Rat)
statuses.description: Spawns a child when the duration ends.

statuses.name: Pregnant (Sheep)
statuses.description: Spawns a child when the duration ends.

statuses.name: Pregnant (Vytrax)
statuses.description: Spawns a child when the duration ends.

statuses.name: Produces Milk
statuses.description: Can be milked periodically.

statuses.name: Produces Wool
statuses.description: Grows wool over time and can be sheared when fully grown.

statuses.name: Relaxed
statuses.description: Has temporarily improved happiness.

statuses.name: Researching
statuses.description: Entities doing research in the library get this status.

statuses.name: Rested
statuses.description: Gained when entities are idle. Rested entities regain Health over time.

statuses.name: Resurrected
statuses.description: This entity is kept alive by a sinister magic. Resurrected entities do not rest, procreate, or heal naturally.

statuses.name: Senectia
statuses.description: The early stages of time debt, which occurs when Ardyn go too long without leeching life from other entities.

statuses.name: Senescence
statuses.description: The rapid aging of Ardyn.

statuses.name: Sleeping Poorly
statuses.description: While sleeping poorly, entities will regain a small amount of health and energy over time.

statuses.name: Slipway
statuses.description: This entity can teleport to their destination.

statuses.name: Spirited
statuses.description: This is a seemingly living creature.

statuses.name: Starving
statuses.description: A deep state of hunger. This entity will lose health over time and needs food immediately.

statuses.name: Crackbone Fever
statuses.description: A deep state of hollowgut. This entity will lose health over time and needs to consume Chella or other stone and ore based foods immediately.

statuses.name: Tameable
statuses.description: Can be tamed by entities with the Tame skill active.

statuses.name: Terrified
statuses.description: Is actively trying to leave the region.

statuses.name: Thirsty
statuses.description: A parched condition that saps vitality, gradually lowering Health over time until quenched by drinking.

statuses.name: Tired
statuses.description: Low on energy and needs to rest.

statuses.name: Trait: Big Boned
statuses.description: They are just an absolute unit. People stop and stare.

statuses.name: Trait: Dim Witted
statuses.description: Book? What's that?

statuses.name: Trait: Fast Reflexes
statuses.description: So good at evading, they barrel roll out of bed.

statuses.name: Trait: Freakishly Big Hands
statuses.description: These things can and will hold everything.

statuses.name: Trait: Bigger Lungs
statuses.description: They can hold their breath for much longer than normal.

statuses.name: Trait: Impaired Arm
statuses.description: A past breaking of the arm still impairs their carrying ability. You can see a small scar just above the wrist.

statuses.name: Trait: Impaired Eye
statuses.description: One of their eyes is grey, indicating complete blindness.

statuses.name: Trait: Impaired Foot
statuses.description: An old injury to foot causes them to limp, impairing their move speed to this day.

statuses.name: Trait: Impaired Leg
statuses.description: A gastly scar on the leg indicates a past injury. The pain still affects their mobility, causing them to be slower than others.

statuses.name: Trait: Jack of all Trades
statuses.description: Ugh. One of those. Can't you be bad at everything like the rest of us???

statuses.name: Trait: Lazy
statuses.description: They fatigue quicker than most. Or so they say.

statuses.name: Trait: Short Legs
statuses.description: Their legs are just a tad shorter than average. Sprinting isn't their strong suit, but they make up for it with a stick to their opponent's shin.

statuses.name: Trait: Sickly
statuses.description: By the ghostly complexion, you'd think they were dead. The illusion is lifted by random shudders and coughs.

statuses.name: Trait: Slow Reflexes
statuses.description: Tree sap looks like a rushing river compared to this rigid bag of ham.

statuses.name: Trait: Strong Build
statuses.description: This is the type that flexes when watering plants.

statuses.name: Trait: Weak Frame
statuses.description: Their figure evokes images of a strand of hay. Be gentle.

statuses.name: Unhappy
statuses.description: Is not happy with how things are being run. Skill output is decreased. Try increasing room quality to improve this entity's morale.

statuses.name: Void Recall
statuses.description: As the dark energy of the Void Woken dwindles, the inexorable pull of the void tugs at their essence, beckoning them back to the world from which they emerged.

statuses.name: Void Weary
statuses.description: Void Weariness is a symptom of prolonged time without regenerating in the Immortality Tomb. Sleep in a Voidweave Sarcophagus will remove this affect.

statuses.name: Void Sick
statuses.description: Void Sickness is a symptom of prolonged time without regenerating in the Immortality Tomb. Sleep in a Voidweave Sarcophagus will remove this affect.

statuses.name: Warmed
statuses.description: Recently warmed up near a heat source.

statuses.name: Well Fed
statuses.description: Has recently eaten nourishing food.

statuses.name: Well Rested
statuses.description: Well rested entities lose less energy over time.

statuses.name: Wounded
statuses.description: Is below full health and loses energy at a faster rate.

statuses.name: Wounded (Bleeding)
statuses.description: Has a bleeding wound.

statuses.name: Wounded (Broken Bone)
statuses.description: Has a broken bone.

statuses.name: Primarch
statuses.description: Leader profession. Leaders allow players to enter the tiles they are in.

statuses.name: Mature Grass
statuses.description: Is ready to harvest.

statuses.name: Mature Crop
statuses.description: Is ready to harvest.

statuses.name: Mature Tree
statuses.description: Is ready to harvest and/or produce crops.
